name: kit-ai
title: AI Kit
description: AI vocabulary blocks: prompt · suggestion chip · halo · confidence chip · generation states · review/diff · disclosure. Marks AI vs human work (iris + ✦ glyph + halo).

files.content:
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   QuantyFin AI Kit · INDEX
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   AI-vocabulary pattern library. Iris-glow halo + sparkle
   glyph distinguish AI work from human work.

   Load AFTER colors_and_type + the Tailwind component layer:
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="colors_and_type.css" />
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="tailwind/quantyfin.components.css (inline)" />
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="ui_kits/quantyFin-ai/index.css" />
   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

@import url('./vocabulary.css');
